M-002.NAME: users
M-002.owns: email auth, verified-email activation endpoint, password recovery, strong-password policy, Telegram auth, profile and admin user operations, internal user resolution

exports.fn-authenticate_user: Validate credentials and return user + tokens
exports.fn-register_user: Create pending email registration for email/password users; canonical user creation happens after verify-email.
exports.fn-verify_email: Consume verified-registration token and return the normal token response contract.
exports.fn-request-password-reset: Accept password reset requests with generic public response and email delivery.
exports.fn-reset-password: Consume one-time reset tokens and update password hashes after strong-password validation.
exports.fn-validate-password-strength: Reject weak, common, repeated, or incomplete passwords for registration, change, and reset flows.
exports.fn-telegram_auth: Authenticate user via Telegram widget or bot-mediated flow
exports.fn-get_current_user: Dependency injection for authenticated user from JWT
exports.fn-resolve-internal-user: Finds or creates canonical internal user identity

phase-44-scope.primary-files: router.py, schemas.py, models.py, service.py, password_policy.py, password_reset.py
phase-44-scope.primary-behaviors: strong password checks, one-time reset token lifecycle, replay/expiry failures, duplicate-email recovery guidance, and safe reset request response.
phase-44-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: Phase-44 backend auth/email tests passed: 29 passed in 0.84s outside sandbox due sandbox aiosqlite hang.
